description: Navigation + explanation layer. Everything a model needs to understand the repo without cloning it. Excludes source code (Lean, JS) — those are in Tier 3 per-idea packages.
header:
# EGPT — Electronic Graph Paper Theory (Full Context)

> This is the full-context version of llms.txt. For the lightweight index, see llms.txt.
> For per-idea deep dives including source code, see llms-id1.txt through llms-id5.txt.
>
> Raw access base: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eabadir/EGPT/main/
>
> Five interlocking ideas from five authors. 90 Lean 4 theorems (sorry-free, axiom-free).
> 157 EGPTMath tests (integer-only, zero floats). Central principle: "The address is the map."
> Live QFT benchmark: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1LQLCHDNp9kCFgJXIzlitaVxuYiHRATXm
>
> This file contains the complete navigation, explanation, and narrative layer of the repository.
> It is generated by: node scripts/generate_llms.js
